message:
test(e2e,bench): add WAL checkpoint parity test and SSI/contention benchmarks

E2E (correctness_transactions.rs):
- Add Scenario K: WAL/checkpoint/journal-mode parity transitions on
  file-backed databases (bd-1dp9.4.1)
- Tests WAL mode switch, PASSIVE checkpoint in WAL mode, mode switch
  back to DELETE, and non-WAL checkpoint sentinel parity against rusqlite
- Add helper functions for direct csqlite/fsqlite query value extraction
  and checkpoint triplet assertion

Benchmarks (mvcc_bench.rs):
- Add SSI edge discovery benchmarks: incoming (4/8/16 active readers)
  and outgoing (4/8/16 committed writers) with BenchActiveTxn mock
- Add multi-threaded lock table contention benchmark (2/4/8 threads)
  with shared vs private page pools and barrier-synchronized start
- Register new criterion groups: ssi_edge_discovery, multi_thread

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
